title: Claude Fable 5：SWE任务性价比存疑
full_text:
elvis on X: "As I said before, for that cost & performance, I don't think Fable is worth it for a lot of SWE tasks.
Tbc, I think Fable is fantastic, and it clearly shines in design & creativity.
Will test it with my loops (and measure frontier efficiency) when it goes live again. https://t.co/yJAqxJojaV" / X

As I said before, for that cost & performance, I don't think Fable is worth it for a lot of SWE tasks.
Tbc, I think Fable is fantastic, and it clearly shines in design & creativity.
Will test it with my loops (and measure frontier efficiency) when it goes live again.

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 正如我之前所说，考虑到成本和性能，我认为 Fable 对于很多 SWE 任务来说并不值得。 需要说明的是，我认为 Fable 非常出色，它在设计和创意方面明显表现优异。 等它重新上线后，我会用自己的循环测试它（并衡量前沿效率）。

key_excerpts.text: 正如我之前所说，考虑到成本和性能，我认为 Fable 对于很多 SWE 任务来说并不值得。 需要说明的是，我认为 Fable 非常出色，它在设计和创意方面明显表现优异。 等它重新上线后，我会用自己的循环测试它（并衡量前沿效率）。

co/yJAqxJojaV" / X Post Log in Sign up Post elvis @omarsar0 As I said before, for that cost & performance, I don't think Fable is worth it for a lot of SWE tasks.

company_actions: 正如我之前所说，考虑到成本和性能，我认为 Fable 对于很多 SWE 任务来说并不值得。 需要说明的是，我认为 Fable 非常出色，它在设计和创意方面明显表现优异。 等它重新上线后，我会用自己的循环测试它（并衡量前沿效率）。
Tbc, I think Fable is fantastic, and it clearly shines in design & creativity.
Will test it with my loops (and measure frontier efficiency) when it goes live again.
before_after_clues: 可能涉及 计费 / 预算管理 的前后变化，需要二搜补足变化前流程。
